data.name: the Changing Prisoner's Dilemma
data.detailed_description:
Brandon and Miles have signed up for Dr. Ripley's new experiment—the Changing Prisoner's Dilemma. During the experiment, it is rumored that some guys have transformed into well-endowed girls because of Ripley's new machine called the Biomass Redistribution Converter.

Brandon mistakenly thought they would be girls for just a couple of weeks at most. Little did they know it would be much longer than that!

Will Brandon cheat the experiment, betraying his friend as a buxom blonde? Or will Brandon become Brandy, a busty brunette who will crave new hidden feelings for her once childhood friend?

In the Changing Pirsoner's Dilemma, you will view everything as Brandon/Brandy. You can move/look around the various rooms of the college facility. Everything will be viewed in the POV perspective. You can change the experiment's outcome by finding hidden clues in the experiment as the timer runs out. You can unlock dialogue options and entirely new routes, including different positions ;)

  • Handcrafted 2d animations 

  • Detailed 3D environments

  • Multiple transformations

  • Cutscenes with dialogue options

  • Everything is spoken with actual audio

  • Secrets to be found in the environment as you unravel its mysteries.

  • Interactive exploration of your new self (and other lewd scenarios)

data.short_description: You accidentally get involved in a gender-change science experiment with your best friend. Explore your new feminized body and your new relationship with your friend. Who knows, maybe something romantic comes out of it <3
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11
  • 處理器: AMD Ryzen 7 5800H with Radeon Graphics
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 4 GB GPU w/ 106 GB/s Bandwidth and DirectX 11 Compliant
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Yes
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
